hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */backend/config/*|*/backend/.env.test|*/backend/phpunit.dist.xml) cmd='composer test' ;; */backend/src/*|*/backend/tests/*) cmd='php bin/phpunit' ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; if ! out=$(docker compose exec -T php $cmd 2>&1); then { echo "Tests FAILED after editing $f (ran: $cmd):"; echo "$out" | tail -30; } >&2; exit 2; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */backend/src/*) if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain -- backend/tests)" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You edited %s but nothing under backend/tests was added or updated yet. Per CLAUDE.md every behavior change needs a functional test (or a unit test only if the branch is unreachable over HTTP). Update the matching test before finishing."}}' "$f"; fi ;; esac

j=$(cat); [ "$(printf %s "$j" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; src=$(git status --porcelain -- backend/src); tst=$(git status --porcelain -- backend/tests); if [ -n "$src" ] && [ -z "$tst" ]; then { echo 'BLOCKED: backend/src changed but no test under backend/tests was added or updated:'; echo "$src"; echo 'Per CLAUDE.md every code change needs a functional test (default) or a unit test. Add or update the relevant tests now. If a change genuinely needs no test (comment-only, pure rename), say so explicitly to the user instead of skipping silently.'; } >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking src changes have matching tests…
